sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Trade 1 contract per $2,436.69 of account equity. The dollar amount $2,436.69 represents the inverse of the optimal f fraction derived from the system's historical drawdown. Applied across portfolio with proportional f adjustment for geometric optimization of multiple positions.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every $2,436.69 in equity using adjusted f values to achieve geometric optimal portfolio allocation across multiple positions.
